title: Categories
description: Categories endpoint can be used to interact with [users](/docs/me) categories.

name_override.title: Name override
name_override.description: Is true if name is overriden with a custom name.

modified.title: Last modified
modified.description: Specifies when the category was last modified.

income_entries.title: Entry count
income_entries.description: Number of income entries with category. Given only for unsorted category.

expense_entries.title: Entry count
expense_entries.description: Number of expense entries with category. Given only for unsorted category.

tags_used_with_category.title: Tag count
tags_used_with_category.description: Number of tags used with category.

income_tags_used_with_category.title: Tag count
income_tags_used_with_category.description: Number of income tags used with category. Given only for unsorted category.

expense_tags_used_with_category.title: Tag count
expense_tags_used_with_category.description: Number of expense tags used with category. Given only for unsorted category.

tags.title: Tag count
tags.description: Number of tags used with category.

income_tags.title: Tag count
income_tags.description: Number of income tags used with category. Given only for unsorted category.

expense_tags.title: Tag count
expense_tags.description: Number of expense tags used with category. Given only for unsorted category.

extra.title: Extra
extra.description: A custom JSON object that you can use to extend Toshl API. Whatever you save into this field you will get back whenever you fetch it later.

links.title: Create category
links.description: Create a new category. Some related data is updated asynchronously.

extra.title: Extra
extra.description: A custom JSON object that you can use to extend Toshl API. Whatever you save into this field you will get back whenever you fetch it later.

links.title: Update category
links.description: Update a category. Some related data is updated asynchronously.

name_override.title: Name override
name_override.description: Is true if name is overriden with a custom name.

modified.title: Last modified
modified.description: Specifies when the category was last modified.

extra.title: Extra
extra.description: A custom JSON object that you can use to extend Toshl API. Whatever you save into this field you will get back whenever you fetch it later.

links.title: Delete category
links.description: Delete a category. Some related data is updated asynchronously.
Get a list of entries with category.
Get a list of budgets with category.

links.title: Merge categories
links.description: Merge multiple categories into one. All entries and budgets with the selected categories will be updated. After merging the selected categories will be deleted. Some related data is updated asynchronously.

category.title: Category
category.description: Category id to merge selected categories into.
